location.description: Redis connection URI: redis://[user[:password]@]host[:port] or rediss://... for TLS.

host.description: Redis server hostname. Overrides the host in the location URI.

port.description: Redis server port. Overrides the port in the location URI.

username.description: Redis ACL username. Overrides the username in the location URI.

password.description: Redis password. Overrides the password in the location URI.

tls.description: Enable TLS. rediss:// enables TLS automatically.

tls_server_name.description: Server name used for TLS verification. Defaults to the Redis host.

insecure_skip_verify.description: Skip TLS certificate verification. Intended for local testing only.

timeout.description: Dial and command timeout, as a Go duration like 30s or as a number of seconds.
